Method used to split the sleep period in sleep cycles, it defines the criteria. I.e. : "Minimum criteria"  "Aeschbach 1993"  "Feinberg 1979"
Include a REM sleep periods (REMP) that occur within 15 minutes of sleep onset.
Include the last sleep cycle even if the NREM period (NREMP) or REMP does not meet the minimum duration criteria.
Minimum length without R stage to end the REMP.
Minimum length of the first NREMP in minutes.
Minimum length of the middle and last NREMP in minutes.
Minimum length of the NREMP in minutes to validate the last sleep cycle.
Minimum length of the first REMP in minutes.
Minimum length of the middle REMP in minutes.
Minimum length of the last REMP in minutes.
Move the end of the REMP to the start of the following NREMP, eliminating the temporal "gap" between 2 cycles.

The number of oxygen desaturation during the valid sleep period.
The Oxygen Desaturation Index (ODI) : number of desaturations per hour during the valid sleep period.
Desaturation severity : The sum of areas under the desaturation events in percent*sec over the valid sleep period (sec).
The percentage of time spent in desaturation during the valid sleep period (SP).
The average duration in sec of the oxygen desaturation events occuring during the valid sleep period.
The median value of the duration in sec of the oxygen desaturation events occuring during the valid sleep period.
The average area under the desaturation events in percent*sec.
The median area under the desaturation events in percent*sec.
The average slope of the desaturation events in percent/sec.
The median slope of the desaturation events in percent/sec.
The average depth of the desaturation events in percent.
The median depth of the desaturation events in percent.
The number of oxygen recovery events during the valid sleep period.
The Recovery Index (RI): number of recovery events per hour during the valid sleep period.
Recovery severity: The sum of areas under the recovery events in percent*sec over the valid sleep period (sec).
The percentage of time spent in recovery during the valid sleep period (SP).
The average duration in sec of the oxygen recovery events occurring during the valid sleep period.
The median duration in sec of the oxygen recovery events occurring during the valid sleep period.
The average area under the recovery events in percent*sec.
The median area under the recovery events in percent*sec.
